name: Milky Way Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 8 MILKY WAY BARS and 1 stick of butter in a double boiler until smooth. Set aside.
2. Cream the sugar and 1 stick of butter; add eggs, one at a time, beating until smooth.
3. Add flour, buttermilk, and baking soda to the mixture.
4. Stir in the melted MILKY WAY BAR mixture, 2 teaspoons vanilla, and chopped nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt or angel food cake pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes to 1 hour at 325°F until set.
Icing:
1. Melt the remaining MILKY WAY BARS and butter in a double boiler until smooth.
2. Add a small amount of vanilla and powdered sugar, adjusting to reach the desired spreading consistency.
3. Spread the icing over the cool cake once it is thoroughly cooled.
